meta.title: Tevi Troy on the Presidency and the Intellectuals
meta.description: Hudson Institute Visiting Senior Fellow Tevi Troy discusses the relationship that past presidents have had with the intellectual class in comparison to the current relationship that the Obama administration has with intellectuals and academics.
